description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with clean lines and a flat roof. The exterior is finished in a combination of light gray and muted pink, with large windows distributed asymmetrically across the facade. The property is surrounded by a low hedge and includes a well-maintained lawn with several mature trees, providing shade and privacy. The front entrance is marked by a curved walkway leading to a recessed doorway, partially obscured by landscaping. The house appears to have two stories, with a rooftop terrace or open area visible from above. The overall setting suggests a suburban or urban residential neighborhood with ample green space.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large asymmetrical windows, and a mix of light gray and pink exterior, set within a landscaped yard with trees and hedges.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, curved walkway, and two large trees flanking the path.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pink facade, flat roof, and a spacious lawn area with a tree on the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back entrance, additional windows, and a hedge-lined yard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the pink wall, large window, and open green space with a tree.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door with a curved walkway, flanked by large trees and minimal decorative elements.
